data.title: Tether Reveals QVAC: A Privacy-First Platform for AI Agents and Bitcoin Payments
data.description:
TL;DR Tether introduced QVAC, a platform that runs AI applications locally on user devices, without relying on servers or cloud infrastructure. QVAC’s modular architecture enables peer-to-peer connections and protects sensitive data by removing intermediaries from the process. It will integrate native payments in Bitcoin and USDt through WDK, allowing AI agents to handle transactions without.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/tether-reveals-qvac-a-privacy-first-platform-for-ai-agents-and-bitcoin-payments/

data.title: XRP Lawsuit: What The May 8th SEC Settlement Really Means for Ripple and XRP
data.description:
On March 8th, the SEC announced that it had reached a settlement agreement with Ripple. The cryptocurrency firm is asked to pay $50 million, a massive drop from the initial $125 million fine. Once accepted, the settlement, which is currently awaiting approval from the District Court Judge Analisa Torres, will bring Ripple an inch closer […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/xrp-lawsuit-what-the-may-8th-sec-settlement-really-means-for-ripple-and-xrp/

data.title: These five crypto figures vanished, died or fooled us all
data.description:
Zerebro developer Jeffy Yu has been found alive at his parents’ home in San Francisco, days after faking his suicide on a livestream that launched a supposed posthumous memecoin past $100 million. Yu’s case isn’t the first time crypto has blurred the line between real death, faked death and something in between.  From missing founders to sealed caskets, the industry has a long history of exits that left behind more questions than closure. Here are five unsettling cases — real, staged or unresolved — that continue to haunt the crypto world
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-figures-vanished-died-fooled?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Crypto Exchange Luno Adds Sixth Staking Wallet, Offering Users 18% on Cosmos
data.description:
Luno has added a sixth staking option, Cosmos (ATOM), for South African investors. Early participants can earn up to 18% until 16 June 2025 before rates shift to as much as 11% per year. The update lifts Luno’s supported staking assets to Ethereum, Solana, Cardano, Polkadot, Near and Cosmos
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/luno-adds-sixth-staking-wallet-offering-users-up-to-18-on-cosmos-atom/

data.title: U.S. Trade Negotiations Exclude Currency Policy Commitments
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. officials engaged in global trade agreement negotiations have not attempted to include currency policy commitments in the agreement terms. The foreign exchange market is experiencing significant volatility due to concerns that U.S. President Donald Trump's administration may be aiming to devalue the dollar or achieve this through trade negotiations.

On Wednesday, the Korean won surged nearly 2% against the dollar, and the yen also strengthened. Earlier this month, the New Taiwan dollar saw its largest increase in decades. A source indicated that U.S. Treasury Secretary Besent is the sole member of Trump's economic team responsible for currency matters and has not authorized other officials to discuss currency policy with trade partners. Such negotiations will only occur with his direct involvement.

data.title: Bitcoin bulls aim for new all-time highs by next week as capital inflows soar
data.description:
Key Takeaways: Bitcoin’s realized cap has grown by $30 billion since April 20, reflecting steady investor confidence and new capital inflows. A Bitcoin price consolidation pattern forecasts a potential 10% breakout by next week. Bitcoin (BTC) continues to show strong bullish momentum as fresh capital inflows signal potential new price highs in the coming week. In an X post, Glassnode reported that Bitcoin’s Realized Cap, which measures the total value of BTC based on the price at which each coin last moved, grew by $30 billion since April 20, growing at a 3% monthly rate in May
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-bulls-aim-for-new-all-time-highs-by-next-week-as-capital-inflows-soar?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ukraine Open to Negotiations to End Conflict with Russia
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has announced that Kyiv is prepared to engage in any form of negotiations to resolve the ongoing conflict with Russia. This statement underscores Ukraine's willingness to explore diplomatic solutions to bring an end to the hostilities.

data.title: MetaMask Falls Behind as Binance Wallet Captures Global Web3 Market
data.description:
TL;DR Binance Wallet now controls 80% of the DEX trading market thanks to early listings, activity-based airdrops, and integrated features. The Alpha program and dynamic rewards made it the go-to wallet for memecoin traders and emerging token speculators. Its hybrid model, combining self-custody with KYC, allowed it to operate in regulated environments without abandoning core. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/metamask-falls-behind-as-binance-wallet-captures-global-web3-market/

data.title: Gary Gensler Exposed: Secret Crypto Support, Public Crackdown – McHenry Explains
data.description:
Gary Gensler, once viewed as a crypto-savvy regulator, has privately endorsed digital assets while publicly leading more than 100 SEC enforcement actions. Interviews and market data have shown the approach has slashed U. S. venture funding and spurred a push for consistent, collaborative oversight
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/gary-gensler-secretly-backed-crypto-mchenry/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 103,000 USDT with a 0.86% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 14, 2025, 17:18 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 103,000 USDT and is now trading at 102,970 USDT, with a narrowed 0.86% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Pixelmon Partners with Ava Labs to Launch Mobile Games on Avalanche Chain
data.description:

The franchise will expand its universe with a trading card game, an anime series, and community-driven storytelling, all built around true digital ownership. The partnership will strengthen Avalanche’s presence in Asia-Pacific, the world’s.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/pixelmon-partners-with-ava-labs-to-launch-mobile-games-on-avalanche-chain/
